title: Irish Rice Biryani
description: A flavorful twist on traditional biryani, combining the spices of India with the comfort of Irish cuisine. This dish is perfect for a hearty lunch or dinner.
instructions: Heat oil in a large pan over medium heat.
Add onions and sauté until browned.
Add garlic and sauté for a minute.
Add tomatoes and cook until they start to soften.
Add biryan masala and stir well.
Add rice and stir to coat the rice with the spice mixture.
Add 2 cups of water and bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low, cover, and cook for 15-20 minutes or until the rice is cooked.
Serve hot garnished with green chilies.
